texto: In rating ease of description as very important, we are essentially asserting a belief in quantitative knowledge - a belief that most of the key questions in our world sooner or later demand answers to 'by how much?' rather than merely to 'in which direction?'
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de John Tuley que provoca temas ligados a sabedoria. Ao questionar “In rating ease of description as very important, we are essentially asserting a belief in quantit…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre sabedoria, world, questions, com foco em questions e belief.
